title: gohrcat's Plushie Friends
description: A datapack that adds some simple plushie friends for you to travel around with and store stuff in :)
body:
# gohrcat's Plushie Friends Datapack!
### ⚠️ A Resource Pack is REQUIRED for this Datapack to Fully Work! ⚠️
- Please visit the "versions" tab to get the proper resource pack for your version.


**Adds some cute plushies to your game!**

The items themselves are just bundles with custom 3D models (so you can store some stuff), but you can also wear them on your head! They also make for some nice set pieces for your house or whatever cozy build you wanna make :D

**Here are the crafting recipes, for your convenience!**

![Cat Plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b939e16e70522fc145a7e69f837ba476bbdefcb6.png)
![Creeper Plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aea46fef892a8f05e7e68083e0879c673f41319c.png)
![Cupcake Plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11f1245973bb9a5a442a7ad2e13a0f878353464c.png)
![Enderman Plushie (Amethyst)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/084688f5d1287253c78d405fc9fa822cfda1d3f0.png)
![Enderman Plushie (Command)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/967f69856eba68632c0036dbb95379b226ab8b8a.png)
![Enderman Plushie (Diamond)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8486c0643bef2603414626a5212292d9914ef6fb.png)
![Enderman Plushie (Grass)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c2d1cc6dfe9e057285bf181deefdca1d638bd85.png)
![Enderman Plushie (Jukebox)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26f3eb415c4092ba5eb3378ac79c2c3131119ec5.png)
![Pufferfish Plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8fc1c2d3d0bde268ad9c73f354276b7b9a50074.png)
![Raven Plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61c2f704962f74d132477e9da8d1eb96cb788dee.png)
![Skeleton Plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b682d42c32bfef744730c161526b793fc159dbd7.png)
![Zombie Plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/836aecbc78ff4f2ec80eb869ac6a6bbde21b5a5d.png)

**Fun Fact**: The cat model, specifically, is a recreation of [a real plushie I made](https://gohrdahn-shop.fourthwall.com/products/gohrdahnplush) (which you can buy, btw).

I make videos on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@gohrcat) as well, if you're interested.

Anyway, thanks for taking interest in my pack. I hope you like it!
